节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to monitor leakage of JS objects.

注释信息: @param { boolean } isEnable - True is enable jsLeakWatcher, false is disable jsLeakWatcher.

parameters.说明: True is enable jsLeakWatcher, false is disable jsLeakWatcher.

节点.功能描述: Register an object that needs to be monitored.

注释信息: @returns { string } List of suspected leaked objects in JSON format.
节点.return_description: List of suspected leaked objects in JSON format.

节点.功能描述: Dump leak list and heap snapshot.
注释信息: @param { string } filePath - Directory for exporting files.
@returns { Array<string> } The array of exported results, index 0 is leakListFileName, index 1 is heapSnapShotFileName.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. The filepath is invalid.
节点.return_description: The array of exported results, index 0 is leakListFileName, index 1 is heapSnapShotFileName.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. The filepath is invalid.

节点.功能描述: Enables or disables jsLeakWatcher. This interface can detect js object memory leaks in a single call, which is more concise than the previous method requiring four function (enable,watch,check dump) calls.If there is a memory leak, the leak file will be returned to the developer through the callback function. Input parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { boolean } isEnabled - Whether to enable or disable jsLeankWatcher. The value true means to enable the feature, and false means the opposite.
@param { Array<string> } configs - Array of types of objects to watch.
@param { Callback<Array<string>> } callback - Callback invoked when an object-related memory leak is detected.
@throws { BusinessError } 10801001 - The parameter isEnabled is invalid.
@throws { BusinessError } 10801002 - The parameter config is invalid.
@throws { BusinessError } 10801003 - The parameter callback is invalid.

parameters.说明: Whether to enable or disable jsLeankWatcher. The value true means to enable the feature, and false means the opposite.
Array of types of objects to watch.
Callback invoked when an object-related memory leak is detected.
